name: Homepage renders the loop instrument panel with ring, stats, and iteration log
description: On load, the dark instrument-panel homepage lays out the circular iteration ring beside the loop stats, with the iteration log section below them.

planSteps.description: Verify a dark-background page shows a circular ring graphic (with a centered iteration count) and a monospace stats block naming maker, checker, verdicts, and lessons learned, laid out side-by-side in one horizontal row on desktop (ring left, stats right)
Verify an ITERATION LOG section appears below the ring-and-stats row, containing either dated iteration entries or the empty-state message that the loop starts when the checker comes online
